title: SOS Wake Message
description: Internal signal published to Redis pubsub channel sos:wake:{agent} to cause wake-daemon to inject a message into a target agent's tmux session. Always directed — target is required.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'wake' for this schema.

source.description: Agent id of the sender in the form 'agent:{name}'. Lowercase, dash-separated name.

target.description: Agent id of the intended recipient in the form 'agent:{name}'. Required — wake messages are always directed to a specific agent.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which this wake message was created.

version.description: Schema version this message conforms to (SemVer, major.minor or major.minor.patch).

message_id.description: Unique UUID v4 identifier for this wake message. Used for deduplication and tracing.

trace_id.description: W3C Trace Context trace-id (32 hex chars). Optional; minted at ingress when absent.

payload.description: Wake payload delivered to the target agent's tmux session.

text.description: Human-readable message text injected into the agent's tmux session. This is the prompt or notification the agent will read.

priority.description: Delivery priority hint for the wake-daemon. Determines ordering when multiple wakes are queued for the same target.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp after which this wake message should be discarded undelivered if the target has not yet received it.

ref_message_id.description: UUID of the send-type bus message that triggered this wake. Allows the woken agent to correlate the wake with the original message payload.
